name: gemma-san-deep-giggle
voice: A seductive low, breathy young woman's voice, a deeper chest register, smooth and velvety with a mischievous succubus purr — here delivered as a GENUINE GIGGLE: light, playful, breathy laughter, clearly amused, an actual giggling laugh rather than a flat spoken chuckle.
description: Design-mode (no ref) giggle variant for the ふふふ opener. Expressive but the timbre drifts from the cloned host (VoiceDesign re-derives per call) — audition vs the clone; revert v_o1 to the clone asset if it doesn't match.
